title: Online survey for French-speaking or bilingual (French and English) temporary residents outside of Quebec - Canada.ca
content:
## Online survey for French-speaking or bilingual (French and English) temporary residents outside of Quebec
Ottawa, February 20, 2023 — Immigration, Refugees and Citizenship Canada (IRCC) has invited French-speaking or bilingual (French and English) temporary residents outside of Quebec to participate in a survey.
By collecting these survey responses, IRCC will have a better understanding of your experience and challenges as a French-speaking or bilingual (French and English) temporary resident (someone who have spent six months or more in Canada with a valid work/study permit) outside Quebec.
Completing the survey is voluntary. Participation will be kept confidential. All data collected is for research purposes only. What you tell us about your experience won’t affect any past, current or future applications with IRCC .
About the invitation to take the survey:
- The email will be sent from IRCC.COMMDoNotReply-NePasRepondreCOMM.IRCC@cic.gc.ca
- The link to the survey will start with ircc.qualtrics.com .
- The email won’t have any attachments.
